headline: Here's Why You Should Add AIR Stock to Your Portfolio Right Now
summary: AAR's expanding MRO footprint, strong liquidity, low debt and rising earnings estimates support its growth outlook as demand for aircraft maintenance grows.

headline: Teledyne FLIR Defense Launches ‘CheMSense™ Protect’ for Continuous Air Monitoring Chemical Detection
summary: PARIS, June 17, 2026--Teledyne FLIR Defense, a pioneer in intelligent sensing solutions and part of Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY), announced the launch of its advanced CheMSense™ Protect continuous and autonomous air monitor for rapid chemical detection. As the first commercially available chemical detection system utilizing Teledyne’s Multi-Dimensional Mass Spectrometry (MDMS™) technology, CheMSense Protect represents a major leap forward in speed and sensitivity, equipping real
